mechanism: SFAS 142 goodwill testing mechanically links policy rates to impairment recognition: higher rates lower fair values triggering impairments ($80B+ surge in 2022-23), which are then excluded from non-GAAP earnings, directly inflating the GAAP-to-non-GAAP gap.
regime_dependence: Holds during tightening cycles. Reflexive: rate cuts would mechanically raise fair values, preventing impairment recognition even if underlying cash flows deteriorate, creating a false signal of recovery.
